001package com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.response.currentStatus;
002
003import org.apache.commons.lang3.Validate;
004import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic;
005import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.Message;
006import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType;
007import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.annotations.MessageProps;
008import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.helpers.Bytes;
009import com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ExtendedBolusStatusV2Request;
010
011/**
012 * Returns information on the current extended bolus (B variant).
013 *
014 * Binary layout (22 bytes):
015 *   Byte   0:     bolusStatus (uint8)
016 *   Bytes  1-2:   bolusId (uint16 little-endian)
017 *   Bytes  3-4:   reserved (skipped)
018 *   Bytes  5-8:   timestamp (uint32 little-endian)
019 *   Bytes  9-12:  requestedVolume (uint32 little-endian)
020 *   Bytes 13-16:  duration (uint32 little-endian, seconds)
021 *   Byte  17:     bolusSource (uint8)
022 *   Bytes 18-21:  secondsSincePumpReset (uint32 little-endian)
023 *
024 * This is equivalent to ExtendedBolusStatusResponse but adds secondsSincePumpReset
025 * at the end and drops the "reserve" field from bytes 3-4 from the domain model.
026 */
027/**
028 * Returns information on the current extended bolus (B variant).
029 *
030 * Binary layout (22 bytes):
031 *   Byte   0:     bolusStatus (uint8)
032 *   Bytes  1-2:   bolusId (uint16 little-endian)
033 *   Bytes  3-4:   reserved (skipped)
034 *   Bytes  5-8:   timestamp (uint32 little-endian)
035 *   Bytes  9-12:  requestedVolume (uint32 little-endian)
036 *   Bytes 13-16:  duration (uint32 little-endian, seconds)
037 *   Byte  17:     bolusSource (uint8)
038 *   Bytes 18-21:  secondsSincePumpReset (uint32 little-endian)
039 *
040 * This is equivalent to ExtendedBolusStatusResponse but adds secondsSincePumpReset
041 * at the end and drops the "reserve" field from bytes 3-4 from the domain model.
042 *
043
044 *
045 * <br>
046 *
047 * Response message for {@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ExtendedBolusStatusV2Request}, opCode -73, size 22
048 *
049 * <br>
050 *
051 * 
052 * <table border='1'>
053 * <caption>Message properties:</caption>
054 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>opCode</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>-73</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
055 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>size</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>22</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
056 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>type</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.MessageType#RESPONSE}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
057 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>characteristic</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.bluetooth.Characteristic#CURRENT_STATUS}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
058 * <tr><th>&nbsp;<code>request</code>&nbsp;</th><td>&nbsp;<code>{@link com.jwoglom.pumpx2.pump.messages.request.currentStatus.ExtendedBolusStatusV2Request}</code>&nbsp;</td></tr>
059 * </table>
060 */@MessageProps(
061    opCode=-73,
062    size=22,
063    type=MessageType.RESPONSE,
064    characteristic=Characteristic.CURRENT_STATUS,
065    request=ExtendedBolusStatusV2Request.class
066)
067public class ExtendedBolusStatusV2Response extends Message {
068
069    private int bolusStatus;
070    private int bolusId;
071    private long timestamp;
072    private long requestedVolume;
073    private long duration;
074    private int bolusSource;
075    private long secondsSincePumpReset;
076
077    public ExtendedBolusStatusV2Response() {}
078
079    public ExtendedBolusStatusV2Response(int bolusStatus, int bolusId, long timestamp, long requestedVolume, long duration, int bolusSource, long secondsSincePumpReset) {
080        this.cargo = buildCargo(bolusStatus, bolusId, timestamp, requestedVolume, duration, bolusSource, secondsSincePumpReset);
081        this.bolusStatus = bolusStatus;
082        this.bolusId = bolusId;
083        this.timestamp = timestamp;
084        this.requestedVolume = requestedVolume;
085        this.duration = duration;
086        this.bolusSource = bolusSource;
087        this.secondsSincePumpReset = secondsSincePumpReset;
088    }
089
090    /**
091     * <table border="1">
092     * <caption>Parsed fields for ExtendedBolusStatusV2Response:</caption>
093     * <tr><td><code>bolusStatus</code></td><td><code>raw[0]</code></td></tr>
094     * <tr><td><code>bolusId</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readShort(raw, 1)</code></td></tr>
095     * <tr><td><code>timestamp</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 5)</code></td></tr>
096     * <tr><td><code>requestedVolume</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 9)</code></td></tr>
097     * <tr><td><code>duration</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 13)</code></td></tr>
098     * <tr><td><code>bolusSource</code></td><td><code>raw[17]</code></td></tr>
099     * <tr><td><code>secondsSincePumpReset</code></td><td><code>Bytes.readUint32(raw, 18)</code></td></tr>
100     * </table>
101     */
102    public void parse(byte[] raw) {
103        Validate.isTrue(raw.length == props().size());
104        this.cargo = raw;
105        this.bolusStatus = raw[0];
106        this.bolusId = Bytes.readShort(raw, 1);
107        // bytes 3-4 are reserved/skipped
108        this.timestamp = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 5);
109        this.requestedVolume = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 9);
110        this.duration = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 13);
111        this.bolusSource = raw[17];
112        this.secondsSincePumpReset = Bytes.readUint32(raw, 18);
113    }
114
115    /**
116     * <table border="1">
117     * <caption>Byte layout for ExtendedBolusStatusV2Response.buildCargo(...):</caption>
118     * <tr><th>Offset</th><th>Description</th></tr>
119     * <tr><td>0</td><td><code>(byte) bolusStatus</code></td></tr>
120     * <tr><td>1</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bolusId) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
121     * <tr><td>2</td><td><code>firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bolusId) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
122     * <tr><td>3</td><td><code>new byte[]{0} [element 0]</code></td></tr>
123     * <tr><td>4</td><td><code>new byte[]{0} [element 1]</code></td></tr>
124     * <tr><td>5</td><td><code>toUint32(timestamp) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
125     * <tr><td>6</td><td><code>toUint32(timestamp) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
126     * <tr><td>7</td><td><code>toUint32(timestamp) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
127     * <tr><td>8</td><td><code>toUint32(timestamp) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
128     * <tr><td>9</td><td><code>toUint32(requestedVolume) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
129     * <tr><td>10</td><td><code>toUint32(requestedVolume) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
130     * <tr><td>11</td><td><code>toUint32(requestedVolume) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
131     * <tr><td>12</td><td><code>toUint32(requestedVolume) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
132     * <tr><td>13</td><td><code>toUint32(duration) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
133     * <tr><td>14</td><td><code>toUint32(duration) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
134     * <tr><td>15</td><td><code>toUint32(duration) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
135     * <tr><td>16</td><td><code>toUint32(duration) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
136     * <tr><td>17</td><td><code>(byte) bolusSource</code></td></tr>
137     * <tr><td>18</td><td><code>toUint32(secondsSincePumpReset) [byte 0]</code></td></tr>
138     * <tr><td>19</td><td><code>toUint32(secondsSincePumpReset) [byte 1]</code></td></tr>
139     * <tr><td>20</td><td><code>toUint32(secondsSincePumpReset) [byte 2]</code></td></tr>
140     * <tr><td>21</td><td><code>toUint32(secondsSincePumpReset) [byte 3]</code></td></tr>
141     * </table>
142     */
143    public static byte[] buildCargo(int bolusStatus, int bolusId, long timestamp, long requestedVolume, long duration, int bolusSource, long secondsSincePumpReset) {
144        return Bytes.combine(
145            new byte[]{ (byte) bolusStatus },
146            Bytes.firstTwoBytesLittleEndian(bolusId),
147            new byte[]{ 0, 0 }, // reserved bytes 3-4
148            Bytes.toUint32(timestamp),
149            Bytes.toUint32(requestedVolume),
150            Bytes.toUint32(duration),
151            new byte[]{ (byte) bolusSource },
152            Bytes.toUint32(secondsSincePumpReset)
153        );
154    }
155
156    public int getBolusStatus() {
157        return bolusStatus;
158    }
159    public int getBolusId() {
160        return bolusId;
161    }
162    public long getTimestamp() {
163        return timestamp;
164    }
165    public long getRequestedVolume() {
166        return requestedVolume;
167    }
168    public long getDuration() {
169        return duration;
170    }
171    public int getBolusSource() {
172        return bolusSource;
173    }
174    public long getSecondsSincePumpReset() {
175        return secondsSincePumpReset;
176    }
177}
